start_welcome:
🔤 **Spelling Bee Bot**

This bot helps you learn English spelling through listening and writing.

🎯 **How it works:**
• You hear a word spoken by a native speaker
• Type the correct spelling
• Get immediate feedback

📚 **Word selection:**
• Words are grouped by difficulty (Easy, Medium, Hard)
• New words are prioritized
• Previously learned words may reappear for reinforcement

✅ **A word is considered LEARNED when:**
• You spell it correctly **3 times** (not necessarily in a row)
• If you make a mistake on a learned word, its progress resets

🎙 **Features:**
• Choose between 5 English accents (US, UK, Australia, etc.)
• Track your progress with detailed statistics
• Switch difficulty levels anytime

👉 Select your difficulty level to begin:
voice_caption: 📝 Enter the spelling of the word:
already_learned: ✅ Correct! This word is already learned.
